title: MailerLite vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare MailerLite vs Moosend. See pricing, features, ratings, and which email marketing tool suits your needs best.
intro: Both MailerLite and Moosend are popular freemium email marketing platforms designed for small businesses and budget-conscious marketers. They offer similar entry-level pricing and free tiers, but differ in feature focus and automation capabilities. This comparison helps you determine which platform better aligns with your email marketing needs.

comparison_table.tool_a: E-commerce integrations, pop-ups, surveys, landing pages
comparison_table.tool_b: Unlimited emails, advanced analytics, A/B testing

choose_a_if: You need built-in pop-ups and survey tools for lead generation
You're running an e-commerce business requiring product integrations
You prefer a more intuitive drag-and-drop editor for beginners
choose_b_if: You want unlimited email sends even on the free plan
You need advanced A/B testing and real-time analytics
You prioritize cost savings with unlimited emails at low prices

faq.a: Neither is objectively better—it depends on your priorities. MailerLite excels in user-friendliness and e-commerce features, while Moosend offers unlimited emails and stronger analytics. Moosend edges ahead overall for feature value, but MailerLite is better for beginners and online stores.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or Moosend?
faq.a: Both start at $0 free and $9/month for paid plans, so pricing is identical. However, Moosend offers unlimited emails on the free tier, making it more cost-effective if you have high email volume. MailerLite's advantage is lower costs for e-commerce features you might not find elsewhere.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, most email platforms support subscriber list exports, making migration relatively straightforward. Both tools allow you to export your contacts and import them into the other platform, though you may need to recreate automation workflows manually.
